mapper.select: select id, userId, bankCardID, password, firstBalance, balance, createDate, createAddress, status, comment from payaccountinfo where bankCardID = #{bankCardID} and status = 1;
select id, userId, bankCardID, password, firstBalance, balance, createDate, createAddress, status, comment from payaccountinfo where id = #{id} and status = 1;

select p.id, p.userId, p.bankCardID, p.balance, p.status as payAccountInfoStatus, p.comment, u.account, u.realname, u.sex, u.telephone, u.IDCard, u.birthPlace, u.address, u.creditGrade, u.status as userInfoStatus from payaccountinfo p, userinfo u where p.id = #{id} and u.id = p.userId;
select id, userId, bankCardID, password, firstBalance, balance, createDate, createAddress, status, comment from payaccountinfo where userId = #{userId} and status = 1;
